entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A climate resilient crop and one of the most widely grown millets worldwide.

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand climate-related stresses.

entities.name: HETEROTIC HYBRID DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: A principal breeding objective in pearl millet to create superior hybrids.

entities.name: HETEROTIC GROUPS
entities.description: Groups of parental lines identified for their ability to produce superior hybrids.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, used as a target for identifying heterotic groups.

entities.name: MAINTAINER LINES
entities.description: B-lines used as parental lines in hybrid development.

entities.name: RESTORER LINES
entities.description: R-lines used as parental lines in hybrid development.

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used for genotyping parental lines.

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of the parental lines using SSR markers.

entities.name: GENE DIVERSITY
entities.description: The measure of genetic variation within and between the B- and R-lines.

entities.name: PIC
entities.description: Polymorphism Information Content, a measure of the informativeness of a genetic marker.

entities.name: UNWEIGHTED NEIGHBOR-JOINING TREE
entities.description: A phylogenetic tree construction method used to differentiate B- and R-lines into sub-clusters.

entities.name: SIMPLE MATCHING DISSIMILARITY MATRIX
entities.description: A matrix used to calculate genetic distance for the neighbor-joining tree.

entities.name: HYBRID TRIAL
entities.description: An evaluation of F1 hybrids across different environments.

entities.name: LINE TRIAL
entities.description: An evaluation of parental lines across different environments.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: The different locations or conditions where trials were conducted.

entities.name: SPECIFIC COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a specific pair of parents to produce offspring with superior performance.

entities.name: STANDARD HETEROSIS
entities.description: The superiority of a hybrid over the average of its parents.

entities.name: HETEROTIC GENE POOLS
entities.description: Putative groups of genetic diversity that contribute to heterosis in pearl millet.

entities.name: F1 HYBRIDS
entities.description: The first filial generation of hybrids generated from crosses between parental lines.
